summary: Comprehensive testing of Binary MLM + E-commerce platform completed. All 38 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI testing verified all major flows including auth, dashboard, tree, shop, cart, orders, withdrawals, and admin panel.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Binary tree BFS placement algorithm works correctly
Commission distribution (direct referral + team level profit) verified working
httpOnly cookies properly set for JWT auth
Role-based access control (403 for non-admin) working correctly
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds admin user, 4 categories, 8 products, and 1 festive offer on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features verified working: Auth (register/login/logout), Kit Purchase (mock payment, cashback scheduling, commission distribution), Binary Tree (BFS placement, spillover), Shop (products, categories, cart, checkout), Orders (team level profit distribution), Withdrawals (request/approve/reject), Admin Panel (all 9 tabs working including Run All Cashback). Payment gateway is MOCKED for MVP.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/register - places user in binary tree with BFS spillover
POST /api/auth/login - admin and user login with httpOnly cookies
POST /api/user/kit/purchase - marks kit_purchased, schedules 24 cashbacks, credits direct referral commission
POST /api/orders - creates order, computes profit, credits team level profit
POST /api/user/withdraw - deducts balance, creates pending withdrawal
GET /api/public/plan - exposes kit_price, direct_bonus_map (24 entries), team_level_map (24 entries), milestones (11 tiers)
Binary placement spillover - verified BFS fills L then R then goes deeper
frontend_pages: Landing page - hero, plan cards, income tables, milestone table
Dashboard - KPIs (wallet, earnings, directs, team), 'Buy Kit' banner when kit_purchased=false
/tree - renders binary tree levels without Babel 'Maximum call stack' error
/shop - lists products, category filter works, 'Add to cart' persists in localStorage
/withdraw - submits request, shows in history table
/buy-kit - triggers mock purchase, user kit_purchased flips to true
/admin - all 9 tabs working (Overview, Users, Kit Orders, Withdrawals, Products, Categories, Offers, Orders, Payouts)

mocked_apis.kit_payment_gateway: Mock instant approval - no real payment processor integrated

commission_verification.direct_referral_bonus: Admin received ₹500 (5% of ₹10,000) on L1 kit purchase - VERIFIED
commission_verification.team_level_profit: Admin receives 10% of order profit on L1 - VERIFIED
commission_verification.monthly_cashback: 24 × ₹1,000 = ₹24,000 scheduled and paid via Run All Cashback - VERIFIED
